title: Darkly Smoked German Pork Skewers
description: A bitter and crumbly German dish featuring cilantro and a char-grill flavor, perfect for a quick fix, and diabetic-friendly.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat, about 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together smoked paprika, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper.
Add the pork pieces to the bowl and toss to coat with the spice mixture.
Thread the coated pork pieces onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush the skewers with olive oil and grill for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally.
In a small bowl, whisk together lemon juice and dark beer, if using.
Brush the skewers with the lemon juice mixture during the last 2 minutes of grilling.
Remove the skewers from the grill and sprinkle with chopped cilantro.
Serve the skewers hot, garnished with additional cilantro if desired.
